'''ngatufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackerass|crackerass]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackerass|crackerass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngatufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngætifith|ngætifith]] || [[word:ngætifij|ngætifij]] || [[word:ngætifish|ngætifish]] || [[word:ngætifi|ngætifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngatutufuth|ngatutufuth]] || [[word:ngatutufuj|ngatutufuj]] || [[word:ngatutufush|ngatutufush]] || [[word:ngatutufu|ngatutufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngatufuth|ngatufuth]] || [[word:ngatufuj|ngatufuj]] || [[word:ngatufush|ngatufush]] || [[word:ngatufu|ngatufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngatuffuth|ngatuffuth]] || [[word:ngatuffuj|ngatuffuj]] || [[word:ngatuffush|ngatuffush]] || [[word:ngatuffuf|ngatuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngatufuthu|ngatufuthu]] || [[word:ngatufuju|ngatufuju]] || [[word:ngatufushu|ngatufushu]] || [[word:ngatufuku|ngatufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngatufuth|ngatufuth]] || [[word:ngatufuj|ngatufuj]] || [[word:ngatufush|ngatufush]] || [[word:ngatufu|ngatufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngatufuthul|ngatufuthul]] || [[word:ngatufujul|ngatufujul]] || [[word:ngatufushul|ngatufushul]] || [[word:ngatufukul|ngatufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngatufuthuthu|ngatufuthuthu]] || [[word:ngatufujuju|ngatufujuju]] || [[word:ngatufushushu|ngatufushushu]] || [[word:ngatufuku|ngatufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngatufuthun|ngatufuthun]] || [[word:ngatufujun|ngatufujun]] || [[word:ngatufushun|ngatufushun]] || [[word:ngatufukun|ngatufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngatufuthuoro|ngatufuthuoro]] || [[word:ngatufujuoro|ngatufujuoro]] || [[word:ngatufushuoro|ngatufushuoro]] || [[word:ngatufukuoro|ngatufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
